reasoning: The effective yield of BBB corporate bonds (BAMLC0A4CBBBEY) has shown a strong, steady downward trend over the past 6-12 months, tracking falling broader interest rates as the Fed normalizes policy. Given the momentum and macro environment leaning toward easing, the probability of an increase over the short run is slightly below 50%. Complying with the instruction that uncertainty should scale with time and distance the estimate closer to 0.5 for longer horizons, the 1-month and 3-month probabilities are estimated at 48% and 49% respectively, reflecting regression toward random walk expectations and 50/50 uncertainty in the medium to long term.
